ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iqa_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., PSNR, SSIM, BIQI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., full-reference, no-reference) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., JP2K, JPEG, AWN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., lossless, lossy) */,
  "supported_formats" TEXT /* Supported image formats by the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, BMP) */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "color_depth" INTEGER /* Color depth of the image (e.g., 8-bit, 16-bit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IQA metric used */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression algorithm used */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image used */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value of the IQA metric calculation */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the result value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES iqa_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., EXIF, IPTC) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., quality, compression level) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., threshold, window size) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_parameters_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES iqa_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., execution time, memory usage) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_metadata_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES compression_algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES iqa_metrics ("metric_id")
)
